name: onshape-mcp
description: Let Claude drive real Onshape CAD — sketches, extrudes, fillets, mates, parametric iteration, FeatureScript custom features. Structured truth-telling on every mutation, multi-view renders, per-feature geometric diffs.

ONSHAPE_API_KEY.description: Onshape API access key. Get one at https://dev-portal.onshape.com/ (the 'Access Key' value when you create an API key pair).

ONSHAPE_API_SECRET.description: Onshape API secret key (the 'Secret Key' shown once when you create the API key pair).
